basics.name: Rodolfo Echemendía Quintana
basics.label: Scala Software Engineer
basics.summary: Experienced software engineer in the technology industry, skilled in Scala for developing primarily backend web products, including REST and GraphQL web services, database connections, and interaction with third-party. I've also ventured into data engineering, leveraging my Scala expertise and seamlessly integrating with tools like Spark. Additionally, I bring leadership qualities with strong management and interpersonal skills.

work.name: Globant / Disney Streaming
work.summary: Focus on high-performance backend APIs and large-scale data engineering.
highlights: Managing a data-core platform with 30+ jobs, including streaming and batch workflows.
Generating multiple reports efficiently using Databricks with Spark and scheduled workflows.
Serving an average of 30~80 RPS for backend APIs built with smithy, Scala, OpenSearch and DDD architecture.
Extensively leveraging AI tools to optimize development and workflows.
Technologies: Scala, smithy, Http4s, Apache Spark, Databricks, AWS, Github Actions, Apache Airflow, Cats, Cats Effects, opensearch, Spinnaker, Jenkins, Claude Code, Kiro CLI

work.name: Globant / Blockchain Studio
work.summary: Same as before; Globant acquired Atixlabs.

work.name: Atix Labs
work.summary: Led the engineering team for Ethiopia's National Education System with blockchain identity integration.
highlights: Led the development of scalable REST APIs for the Ethiopia National Education project using Scala and functional programming.
Maintenance and creating of libraries/seeds for help the internal Scala Development
Integration with blockchain technologies, creation of DID, CredentialID, and Cardano blockchain through Atala-SDK
Technologies: Scala, Play Framework, Monix Task, Cats, Slick, PostgreSQL, Tapir, Gatling, Blockchain, Atala-SDK, Apache Kafka, Redis, Docker, Sonarqube
